title: VCD dump: problem with real parameters
body:
Found here: https://github.com/cocotb/cocotb/issues/2975

Reproduce with this patch:

```patch
diff --git a/ivtest/ivltests/br_gh156.v b/ivtest/ivltests/br_gh156.v
index 296711232..a743c754e 100644
--- a/ivtest/ivltests/br_gh156.v
+++ b/ivtest/ivltests/br_gh156.v
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@
 //
 module main;
    parameter [3:0] foo = 4'd5;
+   parameter baz = 3.14;
    localparam [3:0] bar = 7;
    wire [3:0] bat = foo + bar;
```

Test log reports:
`ivtest/log/br_gh156.log`
```
sorry: Format 1 not implemented for getting real values.
vvp: vpi_priv.cc:882: void vpip_real_get_value(double, s_vpi_value*): Assertion `0' failed.
Aborted
```
code_blocks:
sorry: Format 1 not implemented for getting real values.
vvp: vpi_priv.cc:882: void vpip_real_get_value(double, s_vpi_value*): Assertion `0' failed.
Aborted
